summary: Full IntakePage testing across all 3 states (intake_needs_review, approved, blocked). All 27 acceptance criteria verified. 57/58 test assertions passed; the 1 failure (T31) was a test false-positive caused by CSS text-transform:uppercase making innerText() return 'EXECUTOR' instead of 'Executor' — T62 confirmed the section IS present. No real code bugs found.
seed_data_creation: None — all mock data via INTAKE_MOCKS in App.js

context_for_next_testing_agent: IntakePage fully tested across all 3 states. All acceptance criteria pass. No bugs found. INTAKE_MOCKS in App.js defines all 3 states (intake_needs_review, approved, blocked). App is a React SPA, all data is MOCKED — no real backend. Adapter/model dependency (T19) fully working. Previous iterations: 1/2=CompileRenderPage, 3=ExecutePage, 4=AuditPage, 5=IntakePage. All pages pass.
